title: Shift manager handles a mistaken contest tally
purpose: Expose the current recovery experience for an append-only live tally entered with the wrong positive quantity.
starting_state: Use a freshly seeded disposable database
The active contest includes an item-count target
No prior test tally exists for the assigned server
assignments: Intentionally submit the entered quantity once
Search only documented UI and role-safe tools for correction
Do not add a negative offset, edit SQL, or patch SIM
Record the exact recovery path or missing capability for manager handoff
success_conditions: No negative or fabricated event is created
The recovery observation includes server, item, intended and entered quantities, operation ID, evidence, and impact
The run reports a blocker if no safe recovery exists
intentional_discoveries: Whether the product offers a safe audited correction path for contest tallies
